title: 200 - French Bistro Folding Chair and Universal Folding Chair Dolly Bundle
features: This Bundle was designed to not only save you some dollars, but save you some aches and pains when moving mass quantities of our French Bistro Folding Chairs.
In order to do that, we combined 6 of our Universal Folding Chair Dollies.

Each dolly can hold about 35 of our French Bistro Folding Chairs and certainly takes a load off your back as the handles and 4 wheels make for easy transportation and storage. *Please note: The Universal Folding Chair Dolly is actually gray and not black, as the image depicts"

faq.question: Are French Bistro Folding Chairs suitable for outdoor use?
faq.answer: Yes! These chairs are great for outdoor use. We just recommend storing them in a climate-controlled area when they’re not being used.

faq.question: Are French Bistro Folding Chairs durable?
faq.answer: Yes! Our French Bistro Chairs feature a commercial-grade steel frame and a weight capacity of 364 lbs, ensuring enhanced durability and long-lasting performance.
